Senior Backend Engineer
at Stripe
San Francisco, CA | Hybrid

About the Role
We are looking for a Senior Backend Engineer to join our Payments Infrastructure team. You will design and build the core systems that process billions of dollars in payments annually. This is a high-impact role where your work directly affects Stripe's reliability and performance.

Responsibilities
- Design and implement scalable, fault-tolerant backend services processing millions of transactions daily
- Lead technical design reviews and drive architectural decisions for the payments platform
- Mentor junior and mid-level engineers on system design and best practices
- Collaborate with product, security, and SRE teams to ensure 99.99% uptime
- Optimize database performance and query patterns for high-throughput workloads

Requirements
- 5+ years of experience in backend software engineering
- Strong proficiency in Go, Python, or Java
- Deep experience with distributed systems, microservices, and event-driven architectures
- Expertise with PostgreSQL, Redis, and message queues (Kafka or RabbitMQ)
- Experience with AWS or GCP cloud infrastructure
- Strong understanding of API design (REST, gRPC)
- Bachelor's degree in Computer Science or equivalent

Nice to Have
- Experience in fintech or payments industry
- Familiarity with Kubernetes and Terraform
- Experience with observability tools (DataDog, Prometheus, Grafana)
- Open source contributions
- Experience leading teams of 3+ engineers

Tech Stack
Go, Python, PostgreSQL, Redis, Kafka, AWS, Kubernetes, Docker, Terraform, gRPC, DataDog

Compensation
$180,000 - $250,000 base + equity

We value honest communication, intellectual curiosity, and moving fast with purpose.
